tools.name: update_customer_contact_info

tools.label: Customer Phone Number
tools.description: Updates the customer's primary phone number

tools.label: Postal Address
tools.description: Updates the postal address used for correspondence

tools.label: Credit Limit (EUR)

tools.label: Billing Day

tools.label: Invoice Recipient Name

tools.name: pause_customer_subscription_days
tools.label: Pause Duration (days)
tools.description: Temporarily pauses the subscription for a given number of days

tools.name: update_vat_number
tools.label: VAT Number
